title: Boss Checklist - Mini Bosses Compat
description: Adds Warden to the Boss Checklist with mod compat.
body:
This simple mod adds the mini bosses of Minecraft to the [Boss Checklist](https://modrinth.com/mod/boss-checklist).

- Q: But why are they necessary?
  - A: Not exactly necessary for most users, but if you're using Deeper & Darker it's a nice way to point out the drops to the players.
